summary: PASS. All 4 tests pass (3 S7 server-boot + 1 S8 Chromium journey). Automated scans: 0 test anti-patterns, 0 security hits. Manual review: readability (clear naming, well-structured docstrings), design patterns (_ServerProcess wrapper, fixture yield+finally), DRY (intentional S7/S8 layer separation, not copy-paste debt), change impact (conftest shared cleanly, no regression). Test anti-patterns: none — no fudged assertions, no trivial passes, no implementation-derived expected values. Bulletproof teardown (SIGTERM→SIGKILL escalation, always reaps). Chromium detection checks executable_path (not just directory) preventing version-mismatch false-positives. Hermetic: PYTHONPATH stripped, DYLD_LIBRARY_PATH propagated for macOS standalone CPython. No blockers.
